rows.description: Recd. by Messrs Biddulph, Cocks, & Co.
rows.notes: Formed from combining gpt-5-mini's row structure (correctly separating this header line) with gemini-flash's more accurate name transcriptions ('Messrs', 'Cocks', '& Co.'). gemini-flash merged this with the next line, which was incorrect. Verified visually.
